---
title: "Research"
format:
  html:
    css: [styles.css, research_styles.css]
    link-external-newwindow: true
    toc: false
---

Research is at the heart of ALERRT. The Research Ring operates under a broad mandate that guides all of its efforts:

::: {.rr-mandate}
Support first responders through original, rigorous research — improving their lives and their ability to execute their duties.
:::

That mandate has guided more than a decade of scholarship, producing a growing body of work across peer-reviewed journals, books, and technical reports — reflected in the figures below.

```{=html}
<div class="rr-collective-stats">
  <div class="rr-collective-stat">
    <div class="rr-collective-stat-num">65</div>
    <div class="rr-collective-stat-label">Total Publications</div>
  </div>
  <div class="rr-collective-stat">
    <div class="rr-collective-stat-num">1,803</div>
    <div class="rr-collective-stat-label">Total Citations</div>
  </div>
  <div class="rr-collective-stat">
    <div class="rr-collective-stat-num">19</div>
    <div class="rr-collective-stat-label">h-index</div>
  </div>
</div>
<p class="rr-stats-source">Data via collective Google Scholar analysis. Includes peer-reviewed articles, books, book chapters, and technical reports.</p>
```

```{=html}
<div class="rr-page-nav-grid">

  <div class="rr-page-nav-card">
    <div class="rr-page-nav-icon"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i></div>
    <p class="rr-page-nav-title">Research Output</p>
    <p class="rr-page-nav-desc">Peer-reviewed journal articles and other scholarly publications, organized by year.</p>
    <a class="rr-page-nav-link" href="public_output.html">Browse publications →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="rr-page-nav-card">
    <div class="rr-page-nav-icon"><i class="bi bi-hourglass-split"></i></div>
    <p class="rr-page-nav-title">In Progress</p>
    <p class="rr-page-nav-desc">Active projects currently in the analysis, writing, or review pipeline.</p>
    <a class="rr-page-nav-link" href="public_in_progress.html">See what's in the pipeline →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="rr-page-nav-card">
    <div class="rr-page-nav-icon"><i class="bi bi-book"></i></div>
    <p class="rr-page-nav-title">Books &amp; Reports</p>
    <p class="rr-page-nav-desc">Books, book chapters, and publicly released technical reports from Research Ring members.</p>
    <a class="rr-page-nav-link" href="public_reports.html">View books &amp; reports →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="rr-page-nav-card">
    <div class="rr-page-nav-icon"><i class="bi bi-award"></i></div>
    <p class="rr-page-nav-title">Grants &amp; Funding</p>
    <p class="rr-page-nav-desc">Current and past awards supporting ALERRT's programmatic and research work.</p>
    <a class="rr-page-nav-link" href="public_grants.html">View grant portfolio →</a>
  </div>

</div>
```
